title: My Son And His Wife Forged A Deed And Stole My Fourplex. So I Bought Their Waterfront Condo
description: I spent $110,000 of my pension on a fourplex for my son and his wife, trusting them to send the rental income. They forged a gift deed, sold the property for $320,000, and bought a waterfront condo in cash. I proved the forgery, won a fraud judgment, seized their condo at auction, and now rent it back to them at full market rate. #FamilyBetrayal #RevengeStory #JusticeServed
thumb_text: THEY STOLE MY FOURPLEX. NOW I AM THEIR LANDLORD.
pinned_comment: If your son and his wife forged a deed and sold the fourplex you bought with your pension, would you have seized their waterfront condo and rented it back to them? Share your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: I PROVED THE FORGERY AND WON A $350,000 FRAUD JUDGMENT
